articles.title: Google Search Update Rolled Out
articles.summary: Google updated its search system. Many sites felt the change. The update began over the weekend.
articles.impact: Website visibility may change from this update.

articles.title: AMD's Next Chips Due 2028
articles.summary: AMD's new CPUs launch in 2028. They will use a tiny new factory process. New packaging will also be used.
articles.impact: Future computer chips will be faster and smaller.

articles.title: Metal Gear Solid 4 Coming to PS5
articles.summary: Metal Gear Solid 4 arrives on PS5. It was first released on PS3. Play it on modern consoles now.
articles.impact: Fans can play an old favorite on new systems.

articles.title: Samsung Foldable Phone Name Leaks
articles.summary: A new Samsung foldable phone name leaked. It may be called 'Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra'. It could challenge Apple's new phone.
articles.impact: Samsung plans a new high-end foldable phone.

articles.title: Racer Not Worried by Car Rules
articles.summary: A racing boss is not worried about car rules. New GT3 cars are for racing tracks. These cars are track-first designs.
articles.impact: New racing car models will prioritize track performance.

articles.title: California Age Law Might Skip Linux
articles.summary: A new California law needs age checks. It may not affect Linux software. Open-source systems might be exempt.
articles.impact: Linux users may not need to share age info due to this law.

articles.title: It's Okay Not to Like Popular Games
articles.summary: It's fine not to like popular games. Popularity doesn't guarantee enjoyment. Find games you truly love.
articles.impact: Your personal enjoyment matters more than game hype.

articles.title: Indie Games Shown at Japan Event
articles.summary: Many indie games were displayed. This was at BitSummit in Japan. Developers showed new titles.
articles.impact: New independent games were showcased at a Japanese event.
